segments.text: Lord, my heart is not haughty, Nor my eyes lofty. Neither do I concern myself with great matters, Nor with things too profound for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely I have calmed and quieted my soul, Like a weaned child with his mother; Like a weaned child is my soul within me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Israel, hope in the Lord From this time forth and forever.
segments.speaker: David
